description:
Get my free 5-day AI playbook (what I used to build a $25M+ startup): https://the-ai-playbook.com/pp6

In this video I break down the 6 Power Phrases you type into Claude Code that change how every project starts, scales, and runs without you. It's not better prompts, a smarter model, or more plugins. It's 6 exact phrases the creator of Claude Code and Andrej Karpathy actually swear by, plus the one cautionary phrase 99% of people get wrong that quietly costs them time and money.

Timestamps:
(0:00) - 6 Power Phrases to Build 10x Faster
(0:26) - Power Phrase #1
(3:14) - Power Phrase #2
(5:45) - Power Phrase #3
(7:52) - Power Phrase #4
(11:09) - Power Phrase #5
(12:59) - Power Phrase #6 (the dangerous one)

What to watch next ⤵️
- How Claude Code's creator starts every project: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KWrsLqnB6vA
- How the Claude Code's creator actually uses Skills: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jdLFeBkiy3M
- The Claude Code trap experts see that you don't: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E7RVKqyS_rg

--------
FOR INDIVIDUALS:
- Free 5-day AI playbook (what I used to build a $25M+ startup): https://the-ai-playbook.com/pp6
- Use BuildPartner to build 10x faster with Claude Code (try free): https://buildpartner.ai/pp6

FOR BUSINESSES, Ways to work with me:
- Apply for my Executive AI Coaching Program: https://www.theincubator.xyz/apply/pp6
- Want to build a SaaS product without hiring a CTO? https://www.theincubator.xyz/eng/pp6
--------

LINKS MENTIONED IN THIS VIDEO:
- Wispr Flow (voice-to-text for the interview): https://ref.wisprflow.ai/austin-marchese
- Hex (voice-to-text for the interview): https://github.com/kitlangton/Hex
- Human-validation zones deep dive (video): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7zZy1QTvokM

If you're new here, I'm Austin Marchese. How I got here...
16: First business (SAT Math Tutor)
22: Graduated Stevens Tech, 4.0, College Basketball, software engineering job at JPM
23: Bitcoin ATM company + building algorithms for a professional gambler (fun story)
24: Started creating content, grew 100k+ followers, built first agency, The Incubator
25: Scaled agency to 15+ team members, $75K/M while working full time
26: Quit my job, joined a startup called IYK
27: Became COO of a $25M+ tech startup, worked with Ed Sheeran, Chance the Rapper and more
28: Built a $20M+ real estate portfolio in the background
29: Transitioned from IYK, re-launched The Incubator, grew it to a 6-figure biz in 30 days. Now building BuildPartner.ai

To everyone who's spending time learning and putting the work in, cheers. Anyone can make comments from the sidelines but not everyone can build...

- Austin

Follow/Subscribe

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/austin.marchese/
- Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@austin.marchese
fulltitle: Paste This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.
